# skater

**S**NP-based **K**inship **A**nalysis **T**esting and **E**valuation:
miscellaneous **R** data analysis utilties.

## Installation

Install stable release from CRAN:

``` r
install.packages("skater")
```

Install development version from GitHub:

``` r
remotes::install_github("signaturescience/skater", build_vignettes=TRUE)
```

## Usage

The [“Basic Usage”
vignette](https://signaturescience.github.io/skater/articles/basic_usage.html)
steps through the primary functionality of the `skater` package:

``` r
vignette("basic_usage", package = "skater")
```

Full documentation: <https://signaturescience.github.io/skater/>.

# Package index

## All functions

- [`arrange_ids()`](https://signaturescience.github.io/skater/reference/arrange_ids.md)
  : Order IDs across two columns
- [`calc_accuracy()`](https://signaturescience.github.io/skater/reference/calc_accuracy.md)
  : Calculate Accuracy
- [`calc_stats()`](https://signaturescience.github.io/skater/reference/calc_stats.md)
  : Calculate various statistics from a confusion matrix
- [`confusion_matrix()`](https://signaturescience.github.io/skater/reference/confusion_matrix.md)
  : Calculate various statistics from a confusion matrix
- [`dibble()`](https://signaturescience.github.io/skater/reference/dibble.md)
  : Degree tibble
- [`fam2ped()`](https://signaturescience.github.io/skater/reference/fam2ped.md)
  : Fam to pedigree
- [`ibd2kin()`](https://signaturescience.github.io/skater/reference/ibd2kin.md)
  : Compute kinship coefficient from IBD segments
- [`interpolate()`](https://signaturescience.github.io/skater/reference/interpolate.md)
  : Interpolate over segments
- [`kin2cm()`](https://signaturescience.github.io/skater/reference/kin2cm.md)
  : Kinship coefficient to cM
- [`kin2degree()`](https://signaturescience.github.io/skater/reference/kin2degree.md)
  : Kinship coefficient to degree
- [`ped2kinpair()`](https://signaturescience.github.io/skater/reference/ped2kinpair.md)
  : Pedigree to pairwise kinship
- [`plot_pedigree()`](https://signaturescience.github.io/skater/reference/plot_pedigree.md)
  : Plot pedigree
- [`read_akt()`](https://signaturescience.github.io/skater/reference/read_akt.md)
  : Read AKT kin output file
- [`read_fam()`](https://signaturescience.github.io/skater/reference/read_fam.md)
  : Read PLINK-formatted .fam file
- [`read_ibd()`](https://signaturescience.github.io/skater/reference/read_ibd.md)
  : Read IBD segment file
- [`read_ibis()`](https://signaturescience.github.io/skater/reference/read_ibis.md)
  : Read IBIS coef output file
- [`read_map()`](https://signaturescience.github.io/skater/reference/read_map.md)
  : Read genetic map file
- [`read_plink2_king()`](https://signaturescience.github.io/skater/reference/read_plink2_king.md)
  : Read PLINK KING table
